resources.title: Sliding Window Technique - Algorithm Patterns
resources.why: Good fit for window-based string and array problems, with a clear pattern students can reuse.

resources.title: Two Pointers Technique
resources.why: Helpful for palindrome checks, sorted array problems, and pointer movement strategy.

resources.title: Hash Tables and Hash Maps Explained
resources.why: Short conceptual overview for frequency counting, duplicate checks, and lookup-table problems.

resources.title: Recursion - CS50 Shorts
resources.why: A focused introduction to recursive thinking before nested-list or tree problems.

resources.title: Dynamic Programming - Learn to Solve Algorithmic Problems
resources.why: Deep JavaScript-friendly walkthrough for students ready to study DP patterns beyond one example.

resources.title: Breadth First Search and Depth First Search
resources.why: Strong conceptual explanation for graph traversal problems like islands and shortest paths.

resources.title: Binary Search Algorithm
resources.why: Clear walkthrough of the boundary logic used in insert-position style problems.

resources.title: Stack Data Structure and Problems
resources.why: Good pattern video for bracket matching, min stack, and last-in-first-out reasoning.
